template_data.headline_html: What the pricing fix actually protected.
template_data.image_headline: PRICING IS WHERE FEDERAL WINS ARE LOST
template_data.image_prompt: Split-panel infographic. Left panel dark navy, bold red label 'BEFORE' with red X icon. Three 2-word labels in white: 'GUT-FEEL RATES', 'NO BASIS DOCS', 'WRONG MARGINS'. Right panel cream/white, bold green label 'AFTER' with green checkmarks. Three 2-word labels in dark text: 'AUDITED RATES', 'SCHEDULE-READY', 'MARGINS INTACT'. Center: illustrated professional woman in blazer reviewing a rate sheet. Bold headline top: 'PRICING IS WHERE FEDERAL WINS ARE LOST'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
